Required Check: Every record validates against schema and required FK fields.
Failure Means: Model is not safe to implement.

Required Check: Every foreign key resolves or is explicitly nullable.
Every command writes an action log record.
Failure Means: The game cannot explain user decisions.

Required Check: Every inbox/news/history row has source event or source action.
Failure Means: UI can invent fake text again.

Required Check: Serialized save reloads equal IDs, relations, ruleset, current route.
Each tick returns state patch, events, history, metrics, warnings.
Ratings stay within ruleset bands over 20-year soak.
Visible buttons/tables map to action/column/workspace definitions.
Selectors do not mutate world state.
